title: tectaria coadunata var. minor
intro: Tectaria coadunata var. minor, also known as a variety of the Tectaria coadunata fern, is a plant species native to tropical Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Tectaria coadunata var. minor include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and fever. Tinctures, infusions, and decoctions are common herbal preparations made from this plant, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
